name: Parseable Observability Stack
description: Persistent, searchable logs for Railway apps. Parseable + Vector pipeline with Node.js and Python demo apps. Works in 5 minutes.

services.name: Parseable
services.description: Rust-based observability platform — stores, indexes, and queries your logs

P_PASSWORD.description: Parseable admin password — change this before going to production

P_FS_DIR.description: Directory for local log storage (must be inside the mounted volume)

P_STAGING_DIR.description: Staging directory for write-ahead buffer (must be inside the mounted volume)

P_ADDR.description: Listen address for the Parseable HTTP server

PORT.description: Port Parseable listens on — must match P_ADDR. Railway's proxy routes public traffic here.

P_CORS.description: Enable CORS for the Parseable API (true/false). Keep false unless you need browser clients to query Parseable directly.

services.name: Vector
services.description: High-performance log aggregator — receives log batches from your apps and forwards them to Parseable

PARSEABLE_URL.description: Internal URL for the Parseable service (private network — do not change)

PARSEABLE_USERNAME.description: Parseable admin username — wired from the Parseable service automatically

PARSEABLE_PASSWORD.description: Parseable admin password — wired from the Parseable service automatically

PARSEABLE_STREAM.description: Parseable stream (dataset) where all logs are written

services.name: Node Demo
services.description: Express demo app — pre-wired to ship structured logs through Vector to Parseable. Hit /demo/burst?count=50 to see live logs.

VECTOR_URL.description: Vector HTTP endpoint (private network — do not change)

SERVICE_NAME.description: Tag that identifies this service in Parseable log entries

LOG_LEVEL.description: Minimum log level to ship to Parseable (debug | info | warn | error)

LOG_BATCH_SIZE.description: Number of log entries to buffer before flushing to Vector

LOG_FLUSH_MS.description: Flush interval in milliseconds — logs are sent at least this often

services.name: Python Demo
services.description: FastAPI demo app — pre-wired to ship structured logs through Vector to Parseable. Hit /demo/burst?count=50 or /docs to see live logs.

VECTOR_URL.description: Vector HTTP endpoint (private network — do not change)

SERVICE_NAME.description: Tag that identifies this service in Parseable log entries

LOG_LEVEL.description: Minimum log level to ship to Parseable (DEBUG | INFO | WARNING | ERROR)

LOG_BATCH_SIZE.description: Number of log entries to buffer before flushing to Vector

LOG_FLUSH_SECS.description: Flush interval in seconds — logs are sent at least this often
